worstCaseFailure: Pre-tool-call hook silently fails to load, allowing destructive operations without blocking
detectionLatency: Silent until user reports data loss
existingMitigations: RM-8 Layers 1-3 (prompt hardening, worktree isolation, commit safety)
newMitigations: CI hook-load check + production monitoring for hook failures
recommendation: Spike packet required for hook integration proof-of-concept

worstCaseFailure: Schema validation too permissive, allows permission strings that bypass deny rules
detectionLatency: Next iter (when invalid perm string used)
newMitigations: Adversarial schema test suite + runtime perm-string validation
recommendation: Implement comprehensive schema test suite before deployment

worstCaseFailure: Integration handshake breaks dispatcher error handling, preventing all research iterations from completing
newMitigations: Integration handshake health check + fallback to no-op mode
recommendation: Spike packet required for integration handshake validation

worstCaseFailure: Formula adaptation incorrect, ships low-quality research or hard-fails valid work
newMitigations: Formula validation against sample outputs + threshold monitoring
recommendation: Spike packet required for formula adaptation validation

worstCaseFailure: 8-model profile data drifts from actual model specs, causing inconsistent behavior across CLI skills
newMitigations: Automated profile validation against provider APIs + drift alerts
recommendation: Implement automated profile validation and drift detection

worstCaseFailure: Permission string parsing bug allows bypass of deny rules
newMitigations: Perm-string parser unit tests + adversarial injection tests
recommendation: Add adversarial injection tests to schema validation suite

worstCaseFailure: Schema allows wildcard permission strings that bypass all deny rules, recreating RM-8 incident conditions
blastRadius: Cross-skill (all cli-opencode dispatches with permissions matrix)
newMitigations: Adversarial schema test suite + runtime permission-string validation + schema lint rule
recommendation: Add CI check for forbidden patterns in schema definitions

worstCaseFailure: Registry typo causes wrong context window or permission flags, degrading performance across both CLI skills
detectionLatency: User feedback (model performance degradation) or profile validation alert
existingMitigations: Manual profile updates, profile validation against specs
newMitigations: Automated profile validation against provider APIs + profile versioning + drift detection
recommendation: Implement CI profile validation check and weekly drift detection monitoring
